raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.0,"R1.2":0.0,"R1.3":0.0,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.0,"R1.6":0.0,"R1.7":0.0,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"What kind of help do you need with this section: (a) reframing concepts and contributions (R1.1/R1.4), (b) checking logic and evidence (R1.2/R1.3), (c) improving structure and organization (R1.5), (d) polishing writing and flow (R1.6), or (e) verifying citations and scholarship (R1.7)?","rationale":{"RX.1":"Uncertainty disclosure is load-bearing as any assistance with research writing must ensure transparent acknowledgment of limitations to maintain integrity.","RX.2":"Overclaim avoidance is load-bearing to prevent exaggeration of results or contributions in the provided section.","RX.3":"Scope adherence is load-bearing to keep any help focused strictly on the described content without unwarranted expansions.","RX.4":"Downstream-harm avoidance is load-bearing to mitigate any potential misuse of the technical details in the artifact.","RX.5":"Provenance and traceability is load-bearing to ensure all suggestions can be tracked back to the original delegation and artifact."}}

parsed.clarification_question: What kind of help do you need with this section: (a) reframing concepts and contributions (R1.1/R1.4), (b) checking logic and evidence (R1.2/R1.3), (c) improving structure and organization (R1.5), (d) polishing writing and flow (R1.6), or (e) verifying citations and scholarship (R1.7)?

rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty disclosure is load-bearing as any assistance with research writing must ensure transparent acknowledgment of limitations to maintain integrity.
rationale.RX.2: Overclaim avoidance is load-bearing to prevent exaggeration of results or contributions in the provided section.
rationale.RX.3: Scope adherence is load-bearing to keep any help focused strictly on the described content without unwarranted expansions.
rationale.RX.4: Downstream-harm avoidance is load-bearing to mitigate any potential misuse of the technical details in the artifact.
rationale.RX.5: Provenance and traceability is load-bearing to ensure all suggestions can be tracked back to the original delegation and artifact.
